queue.task: EXPLORE: Linked list in monkey-lang using closures

queue.summary: Fibonacci via recursive CTE! F(1)=0 to F(15)=377. Pure SQL computation of Fibonacci sequence using WITH RECURSIVE. All values correct.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test monkey-lang pipe operator

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test HenryDB PIVOT/UNPIVOT
queue.summary: PIVOT works! Native PIVOT syntax and manual CASE+GROUP BY produce identical results. Rows-to-columns transformation.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test monkey-lang array comprehensions
queue.summary: Array comprehensions work! [x*x for x in arr]→[1,4,9,16,25], with filter [x for x in range if x%2==0]→[2,4,6,8,10]. Nested for-for not supported.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test HenryDB TABLESAMPLE
queue.summary: TABLESAMPLE BERNOULLI works! 10%→10, 50%→49, 100%→100 rows. Statistical sampling in SQL. Correct Bernoulli distribution.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test monkey-lang do-while and switch
queue.summary: do-while and switch work! do{x++}while(x<5)→5, switch(2){case 2:two}→two. Both control flow constructs verified.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test HenryDB GROUPING SETS
queue.summary: GROUPING SETS, CUBE, ROLLUP all work! Subtotals by region, product, and grand total. CUBE=9 rows, ROLLUP=7 rows. OLAP analytics.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test monkey-lang spread operator
queue.summary: Spread operator works! Array spread [0,...a,3]→[0,1,2,3], double spread [...x,...x], variadic fn(...args). JS-style spread/rest.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test HenryDB RETURNING clause
queue.summary: RETURNING works on INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE! Returns affected rows. PostgreSQL-style DML RETURNING clause.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test monkey-lang ternary operator
queue.summary: Ternary operator works! true?yes:no, nested ternaries, with expressions. C/JS-style conditional expressions.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test HenryDB INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE (UPSERT)
queue.summary: UPSERT works! ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE with EXCLUDED pseudo-table, ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. PostgreSQL-style upsert.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test monkey-lang for-in with index
queue.summary: for-in loops work! Over arrays, range(), split strings, nested. sum([1-5])=15, squares=[0,1,4,9,16], nested=180.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test HenryDB triggers (BEFORE/AFTER)
queue.summary: Triggers work! AFTER INSERT and AFTER UPDATE both fire correctly. NEW pseudo-row works. Automatic audit trail maintained.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test HenryDB transactions (BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK/SAVEPOINT)
queue.summary: Transactions work! BEGIN/COMMIT persists, BEGIN/ROLLBACK undoes, SAVEPOINT+ROLLBACK TO enables partial rollback. Full ACID transaction support.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test monkey-lang array slicing
queue.summary: Array slicing works! Python-style a[1:3], a[3:], a[:2], a[-2:], and string slicing. Complete slice syntax.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test HenryDB MERGE statement
queue.summary: MERGE works! USING source ON match, WHEN MATCHED UPDATE, WHEN NOT MATCHED INSERT. Bob updated, Charlie inserted, Alice untouched. SQL:2003 MERGE.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test HenryDB FOREIGN KEY constraints
queue.summary: FOREIGN KEY constraints work! Valid insert ok, invalid FK rejected with clear error. ON DELETE CASCADE removes child rows. Referential integrity enforced.

queue.summary: 15/16 built-ins work! map, filter, sort, flatten, join, contains, first, last, rest, push, len, type. reduce arg order different (initial 2nd). Comprehensive standard library.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Test monkey-lang closures + higher-order patterns
